g.text: Omnichannel support architecture: channel events enter through the application edge, the runtime preserves state and policy, Studio gives
Channel intake: transport, auth, signatures, provider workers, normalization, binding.
Conversation state, journeys, policy, handoff, and output
Infrastructure selected and configured by the application.
Operator control surface: inspect, approve, edit, hand off, resume.
Broad provider surface for omnichannel intake, outbound actions, handoff, contact center, tools, and operator workflows. Logos are trademarks of their owners.
Backend events, scheduled jobs, operator workflows
Omnichannel conversation state and turn execution
approval, edit, escalation, handoff, resume after external work
